goal: Make reruns post a fresh /gemini review instead of waiting on stale failed requests.
assumptions: Gemini requests can fail transiently with traffic warnings.
The watchdog bounds duplicate request risk.
risks: Manual reruns can consume additional Gemini quota.
An unhealthy Gemini service still fails closed.
acceptance: Every non-auto-fix kickoff run posts a fresh request.
Watchdog timing starts from the fresh request.
